code: const KEY='medicalProfile';export function loadProfile(){try{const raw=localStorage.getItem(KEY);if(!raw)return null;return JSON.parse(raw);}catch(_unused){return null;}}export function saveProfile(profile){try{localStorage.setItem(KEY,JSON.stringify(profile));return true;}catch(_unused2){return false;}}export function clearProfile(){try{localStorage.removeItem(KEY);}catch(_unused3){}}
